utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified: every one includes the relevant coverage description and cost details (monthly and annual), and the total_budget includes a complete monthly and annual breakdown. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four selected coverages: (1) LifeFirst for health coverage, (2) LifeFirst for property coverage, (3) PrimeTravel for travel coverage, and (4) LifeFirst for additional services. In the ground-truth data, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' appears under both physical and mental health coverage (rating 8). For property, the corresponding item is 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 8). For travel, the matching option is 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). For additional services, the description matches the 'Wellness Programs' (premium wellness, concierge, gym reimbursement, advisor, 24/7 support) which has a rating of 10. Thus, the mapping is as follows.
